Node.description: Object represents csv generation options that can be specified for each statview.
Node.help: Any statview can be output to a csv file during test run. These options allows api users to specify, among other things, wether the csv file is to be generated.

PropertyBoolean.name: outputCsv
PropertyBoolean.description: Set this flag to true, if csv should be generated for the parent StatView.

PropertyBoolean.name: outputFileHeader
PropertyBoolean.description: If true, a list of name value pairs specified in CsvHeaderFieldList will be written at the top in the generated csv file.

PropertyBoolean.name: outputColumnHeader
PropertyBoolean.description: Use this to specify if the Column Headers should be written in the generated csv file.

PropertyBoolean.name: outputFunctionHeader
PropertyBoolean.description: Use this to specify if the aggregation Function Labels should be written in the generated csv file. The Function Labels are specified in the StatSpec property named CsvFunctionLabel.

PropertyBoolean.name: outputLabelHeader
PropertyBoolean.description: Use this to specify if the internal Stat Labels should be written in the generated csv file. The Stat Labels are specified in the StatSpec property named CsvStatLabel.
